isCustom.description:
IsCustom flags a language created by an organization (not part of
the platform's shared set). For shared languages this is false and
OrganizationID is nil. Mirrors the (shared, organization_id) shape
on the language row with the orphan combination excluded by a
CHECK constraint.

autotranslateTriggeredAt.description:
Progress — autotranslate phase. Triggered timestamp is the
at-most-once gate; total/done give the cell-level progress.

errorMessage.description: Terminal failure reason (only set when status='failed').

failures.description:
Failures — non-fatal per-op problems accumulated across the
job. Empty array (not null) when there are none, so the CLI
can always do `for _, f := range job.Failures`.

plan.description:
Plan — the planned ops. Populated for dry-run jobs (status=
'planned') and truncated to a configurable limit so a 50k-op
plan doesn't blow up the response. When truncated, planTotal
and planSample tell the client how to interpret what they got.

languageId.description: Preferred new fields — pass exactly one.

defaultLanguage.description:
Deprecated: kept for one release. Used to be `defaultLanguage` (string
code only); now accepts either string or int via LanguageRef.

defaultLanguageId.description:
Preferred new fields — pass exactly one. The CLI/frontend should
emit these going forward.

Preferred new fields — pass exactly one. The CLI/frontend should
emit these going forward.

overwriteExisting.description: Whether to overwrite existing terms with the same mark in the namespace

translateAutomatically.description: Whether to automatically translate terms into all languages in the namespace

marks.description:
Marks is the legacy default-lang-only shape. Kept for one
release of the CLI; new clients submit MarksPerLanguage.

marksPerLanguage.description:
MarksPerLanguage is the preferred shape — one inner map per
language code (including the default one).

totalRows.description: TotalRows is the total number of rows in the import file

sourceLanguageId.description:
Deprecated: the original int-only fields. Kept for backwards-compat
for one release; new callers should use the explicit *Id / *Code
pair above. We keep the original field names (sourceLanguageId /
targetLanguageId) so existing TS/CLI clients aren't broken.

sourceLanguageIdNew.description: Preferred new fields — pass exactly one pair.

info.description: This is the API for JDS LangSync service.
info.title: JDS LangSync API

post.description: Create a new glossary for the organization

get.description: Retrieve a glossary item by ID

post.description: Add a translation to a glossary item

patch.description: Update a translation of a glossary item

post.description: Attach a language to the organization's glossary

get.description: Retrieves a list of changes from the Helpjuice integration.

post.description: Initiates translation for a specific change in the Helpjuice integration.
Sets up the Helpjuice integration with the provided API key and subdomain.

put.description: Updates the settings of an existing Helpjuice integration.

get.description: Lists every language available to the calling organization — all shared languages plus any custom languages this org has created. Each item carries an `isCustom` flag and (for custom langs) the owner `organizationId`.

post.description: Creates a custom language scoped to the calling organization. The code must start with a letter and contain only lowercase letters, digits, hyphens, or underscores (1-32 chars). Codes are unique within the org; coexistence with shared codes is allowed and the resolver prefers the org's custom code when both exist.

delete.description: Permanently deletes a custom language. Shared languages are never deletable through this endpoint. If the language is still attached to any namespace, the request fails with 409 — detach it from those namespaces first.

get.description: List the language↔namespace connections for one namespace, including the connection id translation endpoints address.
get.summary: Get languages attached to a namespace

post.description: Add a language to a namespace
post.summary: Add a language to a namespace

delete.description: Remove a language from a namespace
delete.summary: Remove a language from a namespace

post.description: Enqueues a sync job that diffs the submitted default-language marks against the server's state, optionally pushes the diff, triggers autotranslate, and finalises a per-language result. The actual work happens asynchronously; the CLI polls GET .../sync/{id} for progress.
post.summary: Create a sync job for a namespace

get.description: Returns the sync job's progress and (when complete) the per-language result. Clients poll this endpoint until status is one of {completed, planned, failed, cancelled}.
get.summary: Get a sync job's current state

get.description: Retrieves a list of custom prompts for the organization.

post.description: Creates a new custom prompt for the organization.

delete.description: Deletes an existing custom prompt for the organization.

patch.description: Updates an existing custom prompt for the organization.

post.description: Translates text from a source language to a target language.
